title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a serverless GPU platform enabling rapid LLM endpoint deployment on commodity hardware like H100s. Users select models from a hub, configure context windows, and deploy containerized endpoints with sub-5-minute setup and pay-per-request pricing.
